fv3_vorticity_corner.accuracy: O(h^2) (4-point average of cell-mean vorticity at surrounding cells)
fv3_vorticity_corner.reference: Harris et al. (2021), GFDL FV3 Technical Memorandum, §6 — corner-staggered potential-vorticity flux; src/operators/vorticity.jl `fv_vorticity` (imperative reference).
fv3_vorticity_corner.notes: Composes with `fv3_vorticity_cellmean`: the operand `$omega` at each input slot is the cell-mean vorticity emitted by that rule. Corner (i,j) sits at the meeting point of cells (i-1,j-1), (i,j-1), (i-1,j), (i,j); each contributes 1/4. Boundary corners draw from ghost-extended cell-mean vorticity supplied by the cubed_sphere grid accessor (`src/ghost_cells.jl::extend_with_ghosts`); selectors carry no `panel` field.
